reasoning:
The resolution criteria state that the market resolves to "Yes" if Israel initiates a drone, missile, or air strike on Iranian soil that impacts ground territory and is officially acknowledged (or established by a consensus of credible reporting) by October 31. 
On October 25/26, 2024, Israel conducted three waves of precision airstrikes on military targets within Iran. The IDF officially acknowledged the strikes, explicitly stating they were conducting "precise strikes on military targets in Iran." Iranian officials also confirmed the attacks and acknowledged that the strikes hit air defense and missile manufacturing facilities, resulting in the deaths of at least four Iranian soldiers. Because this qualifying strike occurred on Iranian soil before the October 31 deadline, the criteria for a "Yes" resolution have been unambiguously met.
